text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What the what?! I feel like I'm suddenly bursting
with power!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Could this be... the Three Goddesses' doing?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait... So the person who called me that... Could
it have been?
